fields.description: Variant: each value creates a separate SKU (e.g. Color, Storage). Property: shared metadata on all items (e.g. SIM Type, Network Protocol).
fields.label: Spec Type

fields.description: If checked, this spec drives variant creation (e.g. Color, Storage). If unchecked, it is a property stored on the item (e.g. SIM Type). Auto-set from Spec Type.
fields.label: Variant

fields.description: If checked, different values of this spec will have different prices (e.g. Storage=Yes, Color=No for phones). Controls Ready Reckoner grouping.
fields.label: Affects Price

fields.description: If checked, this spec value will be included in the auto-generated item name
fields.label: Include in Item Name

fields.description: Mandatory: item cannot be saved without a value for this spec. Optional: value is not required — if provided and Include in Name is checked, it will appear in the item name; if blank, it is silently skipped.
fields.label: Mandatory

fields.description: Order in which this spec appears in the item name (lower = first)
fields.label: Name Order
